name: pamem
description: Persistent agent memory runtime with shared governance, hooks, and workspace bootstrap.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent agent memory runtime with shared governance and bootstrap
interface.longDescription: Bundles shared memory governance, sync request generation, hooks, and bootstrap templates so persistent agents start from the same stable runtime instead of ad hoc memory scaffolding.
defaultPrompt: Install the memory foundation into this agent workspace.
Repair this agent workspace's memory hooks and templates.
Bootstrap persistent memory structure for a new agent.
